headline: Stanley Black & Decker Announces Release Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings
summary: Stanley Black & Decker(NYSE: SWK) will broadcast its first quarter 2026 earnings webcast on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. The webcast will begin at 8:00AM ET.
